name: American Golf Corp DBA Tanoan Country Club

violations.observation: Observed pests in the facility with no control methods in place. Location: through the facility, and underneath plastic ramp to the door Pest Type: rodent Pest Condition: Observed numerous, significant number of droppings throughout the facility including on top of chest freezer, in beverage storage closet, on soda BIB shelving, inside and behind the soda beverage dispensing station, behind refrigeration, behind ice machine, on shelving, inside the swamp cooler, and underneath plastic movable ramp to the door. Additionally observed rodent nest with dead mouse inside the nesting material.

Observed equipment not maintained in good repair. Type of Equipment: Ice machine Condition of the equipment: Leaking profusely from the top area pooling onto the flooring providing water source for rodents and pests. Additionally, observing organic growth on the side panels and piping off of the ice machine at water leakage location. Observed cutting surface with deep scratches and scoring which limit the ability to be effectively cleaned and sanitized. Location: 3-compartment sink area Type: Plastic

Observed wood shelving at service counter with multiple rungs improperly installed, failing to minimize the need for cleaning due to closely abutted surfaces or making it impossible to clean. Area had gaps along seams all the way around and was raised off flooring, which was not sealed closed, observing rodent droppings on top of and underneath the shelving.
Observed an inadequate air gap at floor drain with 3-compartment sink piping, ice machine, refrigeration etc.

Observed nonfood contact surface that was non corrosion-resistant. The surface was located inside the service area The surface was made out of untreated wood or wood composites with spillage and droppings present.

name: American Golf Corp DBA Tanoan Country Club

violations.observation: Observed buildup and debris on the floors and walls particularly behind and below equipment.

Observed the following areas of the facility in disrepair. Observed numerous holes, gaps and crevices in the walls, and the wall/floor junctures. violations.category: Equipment, Food Contact Surfaces, and Utensils Clean
violations.observation: Observed chlorine solution utilized to sanitize food contact surfaces failing to meet parameters to adequately achieve sanitization. Location: Warewashing machine Concentration: 0ppm Observed equipment food-contact surface with the buildup of soil residues. Equipment and utensil Type: throughout the facility, containers such as those for spices, prepared sauces, bulk raw onions, utensils such spoons, ladles, tea pots, tea cups, brushes, equipment such as deli style slicer, chopper Condition of the Location: Significant heavy debris buildup, caked on, or dried, grease not removed, and congealed on containers inside and out, others such as tea pots, and tea cups with pooled brown liquid dried on top put back for service. Containers with utensils contained significant debris buildup coming into contact with the food contact surfaces.
Observed pesticides used in the facility that is not state it is approved for use in food establishments on the manufacturer's label. Pesticide: Raid Ant and Roach aerosol spray cans
Observed food items in cold holding unit measuring above 41°F. Location prep top cooler mobile unit. Food Items: Guacamole- 50 degrees, Pico de Gallo- 58 degrees
Observed no handwashing cleanser available at handwashing sink(s). Location: Mobile hand wash station.

Observed a food employee without proper hair restraints. Location: Mobile food unit activity: two employees with back of hair not fully restrained. Observed a food employee with an improper drink. Location: by hand wash sink, and prep table. Type of Drink: Bottled water and an open can of Dr Pepper.
